originalTitle: ReactOS (FOSS "Windows") achieves 3D-accelerated Half-Life on real hardware
content: ReactOS, the open-source operating system working for binary compatibility with Microsoft Windows computer programs and drivers, has reached the milestone of being able to enjoy the classic game Half-Life running on this open-source platform.
chineseTitle: ReactOS（FOSS“Windows”）在真实硬件上实现了 3D 加速的 Half-Life
chineseContent: ReactOS 是一款与 Microsoft Windows 计算机程序和驱动程序实现二进制兼容的开源操作系统，现已达到能够在该开源平台上运行经典游戏《半条命》的里程碑。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
